path: PNGS/Aqa ﷺ treated Syeda with respect.png
text: Kisha, the Umm abMu'mirin, said, "I did not see anyone who more. resembled the Messenger of Aleh, may Allh bless him and grant him peace, in manner of speaking than IF&liil. When she came to fim, he stood up for her, made her welcome, kissed her and had her sit in his place. When the. R Y L e P S weloome, kissed him, and made him st in her place. She came to him during i final iness and he greeted her and kissed her.” Reference : Al-Adab Al-Mufrad 571
